contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 35
- Description: Bugsnag handler v0.1 wired (project→repo) + error_id dedup
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/40
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/41
  
  Details:
  Two follow-up PRs to the Bugsnag self-improvement loop:
  
  ## Shipped
  - truesight_autopilot PR #40 — Bugsnag handler v0.1: project→repo mapping wires FixAgent. Fixed the project-name parser (was reading the 'in <X>' tail instead of the bracketed subject prefix). Added BUGSNAG_PROJECT_REPOS as a JSON env var. When the Bugsnag email's project name is mapped, the handler now actually opens a fix PR (with the AI/proposed fix label and Gmail label) rather than just logging.
  - truesight_autopilot PR #41 — error_id dedup. Bugsnag re-emails about the same error every re-occurrence; without dedup, autopilot would open a fresh fix PR each time. Tracking JSON file at /opt/truesight_autopilot/state/bugsnag_triaged_errors.json keyed on the stable error_id Bugsnag embeds in 'errors/<hex>' notification URLs. Dedup write happens only AFTER FixAgent successfully returns a PR URL — so a failed triage doesn't poison-pill subsequent retries.
  
  ## Production state
  - BUGSNAG_PROJECT_REPOS={"autopilot":"truesight_autopilot"} added to /opt/truesight_autopilot/.env (default mapping; operator confirms project name in Bugsnag dashboard matches the key)
  - Restart confirmed clean: Bugsnag self-reporting enabled + both AWS accounts (nelanco + explorya) still healthy
  
  ## Queued in OPEN_FOLLOWUPS (per Gary's prompt)
  Architectural shift to API-direct polling for the 3 stacks (krake_ror, sentiment_importer, truesight_autopilot) rather than email-driven. Captured rationale in PR #41 commit message; will write up the full plan as a separate OPEN_FOLLOWUPS entry next session.
  
  ## Loop status (end-state)
  - Outbound: autopilot logger.error → Bugsnag (PR #39)
  - Inbound: bugsnag_error classifier picks up emails (PR #38)
  - Mapping: project → repo (PR #40)
  - Dedup: error_id tracking (PR #41)
  - Fix: FixAgent.run_simple opens PR with AI/proposed fix label (PRs #38, #40)
  - Visibility: Gmail label on source email (PR #38)
  - Operator gate: Gary reviews + merges (or rejects)
  
  PRs:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/40
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/41
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 58.33
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
